search_query: tomie de paola interview about picture books
combined_text: Putting on a Show | Tomie dePaola Art Inspiration, Art Subjects, Artists Magazine, Color Mixing Tomie de Paola talks to another master illustrator, Will Hillenbrand, about the imperative of the picture book: being faithful to the heart—and to the delightful responsibility to enthrall and entertain. Among Tomie de Paola’s many awards
